---
name: Mock Oversized
description: "Sentinel skill whose file exceeds MAX_FILE_SIZE and must be skipped."
risk_level: low
allowed_tools:
  - mock_noop
allowed_ops:
  - noop
default_ttl: 3600
version: "1.0.0"
---

# Mock Oversized

Everything past this line is padding so the total file size exceeds
SkillIndexer.MAX_FILE_SIZE (100 KB). The indexer must early-return with
a size-warning log instead of parsing.
